sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 forward key expansion producing round keys rk0 through rk10 in a packed bundle for reverse-order decryption use.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_shiftrows: Combinational AES inverse ShiftRows transform for a 128-bit AES state using column-major AES byte ordering.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_subbytes: Combinational inverse SubBytes transform applying the AES inverse S-box to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_mixcolumns: Combinational AES inverse MixColumns transform over GF(2^8).
